title: Promo Wrestling World
description:
Current Build Status

Promo Wrestling World is in Early Access — not the final 1.0. Expect ongoing balance changes, UI polish, bug fixes, and new features as it grows.

You're the booker.Every match, feud, contract, and dollar is your call — and the promotion lives or dies on it.

Promo Wrestling World is a deep wrestling management simulation about booking shows, building stars, managing money, and surviving in a living wrestling industry. Take a promotion and run it week by week: book the matches, shape the storylines, handle the egos and injuries, build championships, and watch rival companies fight you for the same audience and talent.

Key Features• Book the show. Weekly TV, major events, matches, promos, angles, vignettes, and story beats — all in your hands.

• Manage the locker room. A full roster with popularity, morale, fatigue, ego, contracts, chemistry, and push status.

• Tell long stories. Build heat, momentum, rivalries, stables, betrayals, and title chases that pay off over years.

• Protect the gold. Championships with prestige, reign histories, defenses, vacancies, and full title lineages.

• Run the business. Cash, wages, sponsors, TV deals, PPV strategy, venues, production costs, and market pressure.

• Fight for the territory. Rival promotions run their own shows, bid on your talent, grow, fold, and reshape the world around you.

• Build a dynasty. Milestones, awards, Hall of Fame candidates, legacy score, and a long-term history that's yours.

• Own the world. The World Editor shapes promotions, workers, titles, regions, venues, teams, relationships, match types, media formats, and more.

• Pick your era. Start in different eras, each with its own economics, fan expectations, media formats, and industry flavor.

• A world that lives. New promotions emerge during long saves — with founders, colors, logos, rosters, finances, ambition, and their own histories.

Early Access FocusPromo Wrestling World is already a full single-player management sandbox — and it's still growing. Early Access focuses on balance, usability, long-term stability, better onboarding, deeper booking tools, expanded world simulation, and community-requested features. The interface just got a full cinematic overhaul, with more polish landing every update.

If you love dense management games, long-term saves, wrestling booking, business pressure, and watching a fictional sports-entertainment world evolve, Promo Wrestling World is built for you.

AI-Generated Content Disclosure

The developers describe how their game uses AI-generated content like this:

AI was used to generate the images of the characters in World Editor. There is also a 100% optional, opt-in only AI that can help answer questions, negotiate wrestler contracts, and provide booking assistance.
description_short: Book the cards, manage the roster, build champions, and survive a living wrestling industry where rival promotions sign talent, run shows, grow, fold, and reshape the world around your dynasty over years of play.
